privileged_info_summary: This is a Magento CMS landing page task requiring creation of a static block with identifier 'autumn-collection-featured' and title 'Autumn Collection Featured Products' containing HTML with heading and list, and a CMS page with URL key 'autumn-collection-2024' and meta title 'Autumn Collection 2024 | NestWell Home' that embeds the block via {{block id="autumn-collection-featured"}} directive. The page meta description should reference 'Autumn 2024'. The admin credentials are admin/Admin1234!. The environment is a Docker-based Magento instance accessible at http://localhost/admin.
